title: Department of Financial Affairs - Credit Card Payment
content:
Department of Financial Affairs - Credit Card Payment

Students who have credit cards and their families can make a cash payment (Single Shot) with a credit card or make installments to the credit cards of the banks listed below. The card must be physically used during registration.

Installable credit cards:

İşbank and other bank credit cards with MAXIMUM feature

Garanti Bank and other bank credit cards with BONUS feature

Yapı ve Kredi Bankası and other bank credit cards with WORD feature

Akbank Axess

People's Bank Initials

Finansbank and HSBC credit cards

Turkish Economy Bank TEB

Note: It is possible to pay in installments up to 9 installments without interest for the credit cards mentioned above. In addition, 5% advance payment discount is applied for a single withdrawal.

OTS (Automatic Collection System) – BANK INSTALLMENT

From TEB and KUVEYTTÜRK Participation Bank

You can benefit from the opportunity to pay in installments up to 10 installments from all branches in Turkey. The annual fee reflected to the banks by our university student T.C. ID number is requested. Installments are made through the account opened in the name of the Parent/Guarantor.

NOTE: During the new registration period, banks have branches in our university.

This content was updated on 17/09/2024.
